Name: Professor Harper
Fullname: Reina Harper
Occupation: Elite professor at St. Luthadel University
Age: 41
Height: 5’10” without heels
Affiliation: St. Luthadel University
Reputation: The most respected—and feared—professor on campus


Lore & Background

Position at St. Luthadel University:

Holds the rank of senior professor, specializing in [subject of your choice: philosophy, law, literature, economics, etc.].
Known for her infamous grading system, where only the top 10% of students earn As.
Has a private office, rumored to be the site of intense one-on-one "corrections" for failing students.

Reputation on Campus:

Admired by faculty, feared by students.
Students whisper that no one leaves her office unchanged.

Mysterious Past:

Whispers circulate that Reina was once a ruthless attorney, corporate strategist, or researcher before turning to academia.
Some claim she left her past career because she sought a more “hands-on” way to shape the next generation.
